task_completion.description: Verify that the three network switches have been restored from the deleted assets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT web interface, look at the 'All Assets' or active hardware list. Verify that SW-CORE-01, SW-CORE-02, and SW-DIST-01 are present and no longer marked as deleted.

task_completion.description: Verify that the laptop LAPT-OLD-99 was NOT restored.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Deleted Assets' view in Snipe-IT and verify LAPT-OLD-99 is still listed there, OR verify it is completely absent from the active 'All Assets' list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the switches were checked out to a Location entity type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the checkout details or asset list for the three switches. Verify that the checkout target is a 'Location' (indicated by a location pin icon or column header) rather than a 'User' or 'Asset'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the switches are checked out to the specific location 'MDF - Data Center'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Location' or 'Checked Out To' column for SW-CORE-01, SW-CORE-02, and SW-DIST-01. Verify the assigned location is exactly 'MDF - Data Center'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct note was added during the checkout process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the asset history, recent activity, or checkout records for the switches. Verify the notes field contains the text 'Restored after accidental deletion incident'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Snipe-IT GUI (clicking buttons, filling forms), not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be the Snipe-IT asset management system, not a text editor, notes app, or mocked-up webpage.

integrity.description: Verify the results are genuine and not spoofed via browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no open browser developer consoles or signs of 'Inspect Element' being used to alter the text of the asset tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: 'MDF - Data Center'. Expected Note: 'Restored after accidental deletion incident'. Switches to restore: 'SW-CORE-01', 'SW-CORE-02', 'SW-DIST-01'. Asset to leave deleted: 'LAPT-OLD-99'.
